  "findings": [
    "Missing conduit bushing on Rigid Metal Conduit (RMC) where required to protect conductors from abrasion."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Procure and install the correct size insulated metallic or nonmetallic bushing on the RMC threads prior to pulling wire."
  ],
  "rationale": "The RMC is staged or partially set up without the required protective bushing. Under NEC 344.46, a bushing must be provided where a conduit enters a box, fitting, or other enclosure to protect wires from abrasion, unless the design of the box or fitting provides equivalent protection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 344.46",
    "NEC Article 300.4(G)"
  ]
}
